name: Appointment Scheduling
description: Clinic setup, appointment types, scheduling, check-in/out

items.name: SDOE GET DIAGNOSES
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns an array of diagnoses for an encounter. Note: For encounters before 10/1/96, only scheduling data in the OUTPATIENT DIAGNOSIS (#409.43) file may exist. It will only exist if the site required diagnoses as part of the check out process. This RPC will attempt t

items.name: SDOE GET PROVIDERS
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a subscripted array of providers for an encounter. Note: For encounters before 10/1/96, only scheduling data in the OUTPATIENT PROVIDER (#409.44) file may exist. It will only exist if the site required provider as part of the check out process.  This RPC will

items.name: SDOE GET PROCEDURES
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a subscripted array of CPTs for an encounter. Note: For encounters before 10/1/96, only scheduling data in the SCHEDULING VISITS  (#409.5) file may exist. It will only exist if the site required procedures as part of the check out process.  This RPC will atte

items.name: SDOE ASSIGNED A PROVIDER
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether at least one provider has been associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE ASSIGNED A DIAGNOSIS
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether at least one diagnoses has been associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE ASSIGNED A PROCEDURE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether at least one procedure has been associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND PROVIDER
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether a specific provider is associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND DIAGNOSIS
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether a specific diagnosis is associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND PROCEDURE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether a specific procedure is associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND FIRST STANDALONE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of an OUTPATIENT ENCOUNTER file (#409.68) entry for the first the first standalone add/edit for a patient in a specified date range. Use same date for begin and end dates for specific (single) date check. Standalone encounter is an e

items.name: SDOE GET PRIMARY DIAGNOSIS
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of the primary diagnosis code (ICD) for an encounter.   Note: For encounters before 10/1/96, this RPC will always return 0. This primary diagnosis was not retrieved nor stored by the system for these 'old' encounters.

items.name: SDOE FIND FIRST ENCOUNTER
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of an OUTPATIENT ENCOUNTER file (#409.68) entry for the first encounter for a patient in a specified date range.

items.name: SDOE FIND LAST STANDALONE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of an OUTPATIENT ENCOUNTER file (#409.68) entry for the last standalone add/edit for a patient in a specified date range. Standalone encounter is an encounter with no parent and the originating process is 'Stop Code Addition'.

items.name: SDOE GET GENERAL DATA
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the Oth and other nodes of an Outpatient Encounter entry.

items.name: SDOE PARSE GENERAL DATA
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) will parse the data returned by the 'SDOE GET GENERAL DATA' RPC into individual field nodes.

items.name: SDOE GET ZERO NODE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the zeroth node of an Outpatient Encounter.

items.name: SDOE LIST ENCOUNTERS FOR DATES
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a list of Outpatient Encounters for a specified date range.

items.name: SDOE LIST ENCOUNTERS FOR PAT
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a list of Outpatient Encounters for a specified patient and specified date range.

items.name: SDOE LIST ENCOUNTERS FOR VISIT
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a list of Outpatient Encounters for a specified visit.

items.name: SD W/L RETRIVE FULL DATA
items.description: This RPC returns a Wait List data in SDWL(409.3,DA,0). This will only  return the zero (0) node of the file.

items.name: SD W/L CREATE FILE
items.description: This RPC creates a Patient Wait List file for PCMM (GUI).

items.name: SD W/L RETRIVE BRIEF
items.description: This RPC retrieves a brief output for Wait List data for a specific  Patient.

items.name: SDEC ACCGROUP
items.description: Return active entries from the SDEC ACCESS GROUP file 409.822

items.name: SDEC ACCTYPE
items.description: Return active entries from the SDEC ACCESS TYPE file 409.823

items.name: SDEC PTLOOKRS
items.description: GET Patients that match the partial lookup. The partial lookup can be a partial name, Date of Birth, Chart Number, SSN, or empty which will return all patients.

items.name: SDEC WAITLIST
items.description: Collect Wait List for a Given Resource

items.name: SDEC UNREGEV
items.description: Called by client to Unregister client's interest in SDECEVENT

items.name: SDEC TPBLKOV
items.description: TYPE BLOCKS OVERLAP

items.name: SDEC SPACEBAR
items.description: Update ^DISV with most recent lookup value SDECVAL from file SDECDIC

items.name: SDEC SETFAC
items.description: Remote procedure to Set the current facility/division for a given user.

items.name: SDEC SEARCHAV
items.description: Searches availability database for availability blocks between      SDECSTRT and SDECEND for each of the resources in SDECRES. The av blocks must be one of the types in SDECTYPES, must be  AM or PM depending on value in SDECAMPM and  must be on one of the weekdays listed in SDECWKDY.

items.name: SDEC SUSRINFO
items.description: SCHEDULING USER INFO

items.name: SDEC RESOURCE
items.description: Returns Recordset with ALL RESOURCE names. Inactive RESOURCES are NOT filtered out.

items.name: SDEC RESUSER
items.description: Returns entries from the SDEC RESOURCE USER file.

items.name: SDEC RESLETRS
items.description: Return recordset of RESOURCES and associated LETTERS. Used in generating rebook letters for a clinic.

items.name: SDEC RESLETRF
items.description: Return formatted text output of the Resource's Letter - either "LETTER  TEXT" (also used as Reminder Letter), NO SHOW LETTER, or CLINIC  CANCELLATION LETTER.

items.name: SDEC RESGRPUS
items.description: Returns ADO Recordset with all ACTIVE resource group names to which user  has access based on entries in SDEC RESOURCE USER file If SDECDUZ=0 then returns all department names for current DUZ If user SDECDUZ possesses the key SDECZMGR then ALL resource group names are returned regardless of whether

items.name: SDEC REGEVENT
items.description: Called by client to inform the server of client's interest in SDECEVENT

items.name: SDEC SETRBOOK
items.description: Sets rebook date into appointment

items.name: SDEC REBKNEXT
items.description: GET - find next ACCESS BLOCK in resource SDECRES after SDECSTART.

items.name: SDEC REBKLIST
items.description: Return patient appointments used in listing Re-Booked appointments.

items.name: SDEC RAISEVNT
items.description: Raise Event

items.name: SDEC PROVCLIN
items.description: Remote procedure to return the Providers that are assigned to a given  Clinic.

items.name: SDEC APPTLETR
items.description: Print Appointment Letter. Print appointment letter. Currently supports No-Show, Cancel by Patient,  and Cancel by Clinic.

items.name: SDEC PATAPPTH
items.description: Remote procedure to return the Patient appointment history in formatted  text.

items.name: SDEC PATAPPTD
items.description: Return recordset of patient appointments used in listing a patient's appointments and generating patient letters.

items.name: SDEC OVBOOK
items.description: Check if Overbook is allowed for given Clinic and Date.

items.name: SDEC NOSHOPAT
items.description: COLLECT NO-SHOW DATA for Patient

items.name: SDEC NOSHOW
items.description: Sets appointment noshow flag in SDEC APPOINTMENT file

items.name: SDEC NEWPERS
items.description: return entries from the NEW PERSON table 200 that are 'active' AND have  PROVIDER CLASS defined.

items.name: SDEC WLSET
items.description: Waitlist Set

items.name: SDEC WLGET
items.description: Waitlist GET

items.name: SDEC WLCLOSE
items.description: Remove a Patient from the Wait List by setting the STATUS to CLOSED  and updating the DISPOSITION fields.

items.name: SDEC SVSPALL
items.description: Return the IEN and NAME for all entries in the SD WL SERVICE/SPECIALTY  file

items.name: SDEC PROVALL
items.description: Return all providers for a given clinic from the HOSPITAL LOCATION file 44

items.name: SDEC CLINALL
items.description: Return the IEN and NAME for all entries in the SD WL CLINIC LOCATION file

items.name: SDEC IMHERE
items.description: Returns a simple value to client.  Used to establish continued existence  of the client to the server; resets the server READ timeout.

items.name: SDEC PWH
items.description: Return a list of entries from the HEALTH SUMMARY PWH TYPES file.

items.name: SDEC HOSPLOC
items.description: Get HOSPITAL LOCATIONS

items.name: SDEC HOLIDAY
items.description: Remote Procedure to return data for the HOLIDAY file.

items.name: SDEC HLTHSUMM
items.description: Returns the text for a Health Summary report.

items.name: SDEC RESGPUSR
items.description: Returns ADO Recordset with all ACTIVE GROUP/RESOURCE combinations to which user has access based on entries in SDEC RESOURCE USER file If SDECDUZ=0 then returns all ACTIVE GROUP/RESOURCE combinations for  current DUZ If user SDECDUZ possesses the key SDECZMGR then ALL ACTIVE resource group names are

items.name: SDEC GETFAC
items.description: Remote procedure to return the currently assigned facilities/divisions  for a given user.

items.name: SDEC GETREGA
items.description: return basic reg info/demographics for given patient

items.name: SDEC ACCGPTYG
items.description: Get access group types

items.name: SDEC EHRPT
items.description: Raise patient selection event to EHR

items.name: SDEC EDITAPPT
items.description: Edit appointment (only 'note text' can be edited.)

items.name: SDEC DELRU
items.description: Delete Resource User from SDEC RESOURCE USER file

items.name: SDEC DELRESGP
items.description: Deletes entry name SDECGRP from SDEC RESOURCE GROUP file

items.name: SDEC DELRGI
items.description: Deletes entry SDECIEN1 from entry SDECIEN in the SDEC RESOURCE GROUP file.

items.name: SDEC DELAGI
items.description: Delete entry with the given Access Group and Access Type from the SDEC  ACCESS GROUP TYPE file.

items.name: SDEC DELAG
items.description: Deletes entry having IEN SDECGRP from SDEC ACCESS GROUP file. Also deletes all entries in SDEC ACCESS GROUP TYPE that point to this  group. Return recordset containing error message or "" if no error.

items.name: SDES SET APPT CHECK-IN STEP
items.description: SET CHECK-IN STATUS FOR PATIENT IN 409.843   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES SET CHECK-IN STEP
items.description: CREATE NEW STATUS IN FILE 409.842   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES EDIT CHECK-IN STEP
items.description: EDIT STATUS ENTRY IN 409.842   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET CHECK-IN STEP
items.description: GET STATUS ENTRY FROM 409.842   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET CHECK-IN STEPS
items.description: GET ALL STATUS ENTRIES IN 409.842   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPTS BY RESOURCE
items.description: For a given clinic and date range, return general appointment data in JSON format   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET INSURANCE VERIFY REQ
items.description: DETERMINE IF A PATIENT'S INSURANCE NEEDS VERIFIED.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPT REQ BY IEN
items.description: Get a specific appointment request based on IEN (409.85)   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPT REQ BY PATIENT
items.description: Returns a list of appointment requests based on patient DFN   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES DISPOSITION APPT REQ
items.description: Dispositioning/closing an appointment request   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES CREATE APPT REQ
items.description: Creates new appointment request entry in File 409.85   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES EDIT APPT REQ
items.description: Allows editing of appointment requests.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES SEARCH CLINIC
items.description: GIVEN A STRING, RETURNS MATCHING CLINIC IENS AND NAMES.   FIRST 50 RESULTS.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES CREATE APPT BLK AND MOVE
items.description: APPOINTMENT BLOCK AND MOVE.  THIS WILL MOVE AN APPOINTMENT TO A NEW CLINIC AND DATE/TIME, CANCEL THE ORIGINAL APPOINTMENT AND KEEP THE ORIGINAL SLOT BLOCKED SO IT CAN NOT BE REBOOKED.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES INACTIVATE/ZZ CLINIC
items.description: SDES RPC to INACTIVATE clinic from HOSPITAL LOCATION file (44) - single IEN   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET CLIN AVAILABILITY
items.description: This RPC returns available appointment slots within a given timeframe for a given clinic in JSON format.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES CREATE CLIN AVAILABILITY
items.description: Set the clinic availability.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES CANCEL CLIN AVAILABILITY
items.description: Cancel Clinic Availability.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET USRPROFILE
items.description: SDES RPC to return IEN, username, options, and keys for given user.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES EDIT CLINIC AVAILABILITY
items.description: CREATE NEW SCHEDULING PATTERN FOR A CLINIC THAT HAS AN EXISTING PATTERN.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET RECALL BY IEN
items.description: Returns a single recall based on the IEN that is passed in.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET RECALLS BY DFN
items.description: Returns a list of recall requests based on patient DFN.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES DISPOSITION RECALL REQ
items.description: DISPOSITION and DELETE an entry from the RECALL REMINDERS file (403.5).  During the deletion of the entry, the new-style xref in 403.5 will  trigger the move of the data from 403.5 to the RECALL REMINDERS REMOVED  file (403.56).   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET STOPCD DETAIL
items.description: RPC TO READ FROM CLINIC STOP FILE 40.7   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET PATCH NUMBER
items.description: Returns the last patch number that was installed on the system and the  date it was installed.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET USER PROFILE BY DUZ
items.description: RPC to get User Profile by DUZ.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES PRINT PATIENT APPTS
items.description: Print All of a given patients appointments for the a given time range, if  time range not provided, will default to begin date of today (now) and  then 90 days from begin date.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET MISSION ACT ELIG
items.description: Create an RPC to calculate whether patient is mission act eligible based  on their appt request IEN, PID, and selected appointment date.   Use stop code to determine primary care vs specialty-verify stop codes  that are primary care.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET INSURANCE VERIFY LIST
items.description: Given a list of Patient Data File Numbers (DFNs), return a list of  indicators.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES CREATE APPOINTMENTS
items.description: This RPC creates an appointment entry in File 409.84, File 44, and File 2.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET CONSULTS BY IEN
items.description: Returns one ACTIVE or PENDING CONSULT for a patient in JSON format for   the Internal Entry Value (IEN) passed in.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET CONSULTS BY DFN
items.description: RPC returns list of Active or Pending Consults/Procedures by Patient DFN.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPT REQ LIST BY DFN
items.description: This RPC will return all appointment requests, of all types (appt req,  consult, recall) based on a patient DFN.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPT CHECK-IN STEPS 2
items.description: Get all statuses associated with an appointment IEN   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPT CHECK-IN STEP 2
items.description: Returns status if match is found in 409.843   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET PATIENT FLAGS
items.description: This RPC will return fugitive/felon flag and all the active National and  Local flags assigned to the given patient.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPT REQ BY PAT ALL
items.description: Returns a list of appointment requests based on patient DFN regardless of  status, with optional date range.    Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET APPT REQ BY PAT OPEN
items.description: Returns a list of appointment requests with a status of Open based on patient DFN.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES ADD PRIV USER
items.description: Add a privileged user to Hospital Location #44   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES DELETE PRIV USER
items.description: Delete a Privileged User from Hospital Location #44   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET DIVISION LIST
items.description: This RPC returns a list of division, given search the search text  provided. The division list comes from the MEDICAL CENTER DIVISION file  (#40.8).   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES READ PRIV USERS
items.description: Returns all privileged users from Hospital Location file #44   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES DELETE PRIV USERS
items.description: deletes all Privileged users from Hospital Location #44   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES SEARCH PRIVILEGED USER
items.description: This RPC that allows users to search a person's name either partially or  fully. The RPC will perform a search that matches the search criteria  (3-35 characters), and then, retrieves and returns a list of ACTIVE users  from the NEW PERSON File #200 regardless if they are already a privileged  user

items.name: SDES SEARCH PROVIDERS
items.description: Retrieve list of active providers with a given string.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET LETTER TYPES
items.description: This RPC returns a list of the letter types from the LETTER TYPE file  (#407.6).   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET LETTERS BY TYPE
items.description: This RPC will retrieve a list of letters from the LETTER file ($407.5), given the letter type (required), and text to match (optional).   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES GET LETTER BY IEN
items.description: This RPC returns the full letter information from the LETTER file  (#407.5), given the letter IEN.   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES CREATE WALKIN APPT
items.description: Creates appointment request, appointment, and does check-in for walk-in  appointments.    Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.name: SDES CREATE VET REQ SCHED APPT
items.description: This RPC performs the following events: 1. Creates a NEW APPOINTMENT REQUEST in File #409.85, 2. Creates an appointment entry in File 409.84, File 44, and File 2, 3. Dispositions/Closes the appointment request in File #409.85   Can only be invoked by Acheron

items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns an array of diagnoses for an encounter. Note: For encounters before 10/1/96, only scheduling data in the OUTPATIENT DIAGNOSIS (#409.43) file may exist. It will only exist if the site required diagnoses as part of the check out process. This RPC will attempt t

Note: For encounters before 10/1/96, only scheduling data in the SCHEDULING VISITS  (#409.5) file may exist. It will only exist if the site required procedures as part of the check out process. items.name: SDOE ASSIGNED A PROVIDER
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether at least one provider has been associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE ASSIGNED A DIAGNOSIS
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether at least one diagnoses has been associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE ASSIGNED A PROCEDURE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether at least one procedure has been associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND PROVIDER
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether a specific provider is associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND DIAGNOSIS
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether a specific diagnosis is associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND PROCEDURE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a boolean indicator on whether a specific procedure is associated with an encounter.

items.name: SDOE FIND FIRST STANDALONE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of an OUTPATIENT ENCOUNTER file (#409.68) entry for the first the first standalone add/edit for a patient in a specified date range. Use same date for begin and end dates for specific (single) date check. Standalone encounter is an e

items.name: SDOE GET PRIMARY DIAGNOSIS
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of the primary diagnosis code (ICD) for an encounter.   Note: For encounters before 10/1/96, this RPC will always return 0. This primary diagnosis was not retrieved nor stored by the system for these 'old' encounters.

items.name: SDOE FIND FIRST ENCOUNTER
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of an OUTPATIENT ENCOUNTER file (#409.68) entry for the first encounter for a patient in a specified date range.

items.name: SDOE FIND LAST STANDALONE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the internal entry number of an OUTPATIENT ENCOUNTER file (#409.68) entry for the last standalone add/edit for a patient in a specified date range. Standalone encounter is an encounter with no parent and the originating process is 'Stop Code Addition'.

items.name: SDOE GET GENERAL DATA
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the Oth and other nodes of an Outpatient Encounter entry.

items.name: SDOE PARSE GENERAL DATA
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) will parse the data returned by the 'SDOE GET GENERAL DATA' RPC into individual field nodes.

items.name: SDOE GET ZERO NODE
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns the zeroth node of an Outpatient Encounter.

items.name: SDOE LIST ENCOUNTERS FOR DATES
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a list of Outpatient Encounters for a specified date range.

items.name: SDOE LIST ENCOUNTERS FOR PAT
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a list of Outpatient Encounters for a specified patient and specified date range.

items.name: SDOE LIST ENCOUNTERS FOR VISIT
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) returns a list of Outpatient Encounters for a specified visit.
